name: lti_resource_link_updated
definition: The event is emitted any time an existing resource link is updated via API request.
trigger: Triggered when an existing LTI resource link is updated.

schema.context_id: The global Canvas id of the context.
schema.context_type: The type of the context, either Course or Assignment.
schema.resource_link_id: The global Canvas id of the resource link.
schema.resource_link_uuid: The LTI uuid of the resource link.
schema.lookup_uuid: Used to track resource links across content migrations.
schema.context_external_tool_id: The global Canvas id of the LTI 1.3 deployment that owns this resource link.
schema.url: The LTI launch URL for this resource link.
schema.workflow_state: The workflow state of the resource link.

metadata.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_14_3) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/73.0.3683.103 Safari/537.36
